requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Type Approval (INCM) and electrical conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容／无线型号核准（INCM）与电气合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容／無線型號核准（INCM）與電氣合格評定

summary.en: Mozambique does not use a CE-mark regime or EU-style EMC Directive structure. Wired-only lithium batteries and power banks are handled through general conformity and import inspection in the INNOQ system. If a product has any wireless function such as Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, or wireless charging, Mozambique requires INCM involvement and radio type approval before import, sale, or use. Electrical mains compatibility should reflect Mozambique practice: 220 V and 50 Hz, with the same frequency as China but different nominal assumptions for single-phase versus multi-phase generation in logistics and charger design.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克未采用CE标志制度，也不存在欧盟式EMC指令框架。纯有线锂电池或移动电源通常走INNOQ合格评定和进口检验。若产品含任何无线功能（如蓝牙、Wi-Fi或无线充电），在进口、销售或使用前需通过INCM相关无线型号核准。电气规格应按莫桑比克环境匹配：220 V、50 Hz，频率与中国一致，但单相与三相电压体系假设不同，充电器设计与插头需匹配当地实践。
summary.zht: 莫桑比克未採用CE標誌制度，也不存在歐盟式EMC指令架構。純有線鋰電池或行動電源通常走INNOQ合格評定和進口檢驗。若產品含任何無線功能（如藍牙、Wi-Fi或無線充電），在進口、銷售或使用前需通過INCM相關無線型號核准。電氣規格應按莫桑比克環境匹配：220 V、50 Hz，頻率與中國一致，但單相與三相電壓體系假設不同，充電器設計與插頭需符合當地實務。

standards_or_laws: INCM-type approval framework for radio equipment in Mozambique
INNOQ conformity paths for general product safety and EMC expectations
Mozambique 220 V, 50 Hz supply context and market-use packaging requirements

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled electronics use SRRC type approval and may require CCC when CCC scope applies; EMC and radio compliance is supported by GB/GB-T standards aligned to CISPR. These documents are valid in China, but do not in themselves replace INCM type approval in Mozambique. For wired models, Chinese GB-T compliance documents are relevant only at technical level for baseline evidence.
summary.zh: 中国含无线功能电子产品通常需要SRRC型号核准，并在适用时执行CCC；EMC和无线合规以GB/GB-T对CISPR系标准执行。该类文件在中国有效，但不能直接替代莫桑比克INCM型号核准；对于纯有线型号，中国的GB-T文件仅作为技术层面基础参考。
summary.zht: 中國含無線功能電子產品通常需要SRRC型號核准，並在適用時執行CCC；EMC和無線合規以GB/GB-T對CISPR系標準執行。該類文件在中國有效，但不能直接替代莫桑比克INCM型號核准；對於純有線型號，中國的GB-T文件僅作為技術層面基礎參考。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 and related GB/GB-T EMC standards
SRRC type approval where a wireless radio function is present
CCC where the finished product is in applicable scope

gap.en: The key gap is procedural: there is no CE mark substitution, and INCM radio approval is required when wireless functions are present. For power bank chargers and adapters, ensure 220 V 50 Hz suitability and local user-carrying safety documents in Portuguese. Chinese documents generally remain technical references only and should be mapped to Mozambique acceptance routes before shipment.
gap.zh: 主要差距在流程上：无CE标志替代，且含无线功能产品需INCM核准。对于电源适配器/充电器产品，应确认220V 50Hz适配性，并准备葡文技术和合规文件。中国文件通常只能作为技术参考，需在发货前映射到莫桑比克认可路径。
gap.zht: 主要差距在流程上：無CE標誌替代，且含無線功能產品需INCM核准。對於電源適配器/充電器產品，應確認220V 50Hz適配性，並準備葡文技術及合規文件。中國文件通常只能作為技術參考，需在發貨前映射到莫桑比克認可路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless models when INCM approval applies; wired products are assessed through INNOQ import conformity without CE mark mechanism
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — SRRC approval for wireless equipment and CCC where in scope

source.publisher: Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (INNOQ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique does not run a CE mark regime. Exporters should assume INCM type approval is required for any wireless function and keep Portugal/ Mozambican Portuguese documentation ready. Chinese SRRC/CCC marks help domestic sales but are not direct substitutes in Mozambique.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克未运行CE标志体系。出口商应假定含无线功能产品需要INCM型号核准，并准备葡萄牙语文件。中国的SRRC和CCC标志可用于中国国内销售，但不能作为莫桑比克直接替代依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫桑比克未運行CE標誌體系。出口商應假定含無線功能產品需要INCM型號核准，並準備葡萄牙語文件。中國的SRRC與CCC標誌可用于中國國內銷售，但不能作為莫桑比克直接替代依據。
